votes.rationale: Motion-0040 successfully proved the first real Claude usage path for dev-jai-nexus. The validated setup routine, generated bootstrap pack, and active motion artifacts were used together in a real bounded session, and the resulting report captured what the setup stack already solves and what still benefits from explicit task framing.

The motion stayed appropriately scoped. It did not redesign the bootstrap generator or drift into provider orchestration, and instead produced concrete operational evidence about how the current Claude setup behaves in practice.

The implementation is coherent and strategically useful. The first live usage report and passalong artifact now give dev-jai-nexus a real operational proof that the Claude setup stack reduces recontextualization while preserving canonical governance boundaries.
